infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Stockr uses the camera to scan box QR codes and product barcodes, and to take photos of items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Stockr uses your photo library to attach product images to items.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Stockr saves item photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Stockr uses Bluetooth to print QR labels and sync with nearby devices.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Stockr uses Bluetooth to communicate with the label printer and nearby devices.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Stockr uses your local network to sync data with nearby devices.

plugins.cameraPermission: Stockr uses the camera to scan box QR codes, product barcodes, and take item photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Stockr uses your photo library to attach product images to items.
plugins.cameraPermission: Stockr uses the camera to take item photos.
